title: Bursts, Panels, Markers, Scrubbers & Codes
description: Five fresh drops: canvas confetti physics, hover-expanding image panels, animated marker highlights, drag-to-scrub number fields, and a slick OTP code input.

drops.title: Confetti Physics Bursts
drops.description: Hand-rolled canvas particle bursts — cannons, fireworks and rain — driven by gravity and drag, no library.
drops.concept: Each burst pushes a batch of particles onto a single canvas with a randomized launch angle and speed, then a requestAnimationFrame loop integrates gravity, air drag, rotation and a flutter squash before fading each flake out. It reimplements the celebratory motion popularized by canvas-confetti from first principles, with live physics knobs.

interaction.mouse: Click a preset button or click anywhere on the canvas to fire a burst there
interaction.click: Each button triggers a different emitter (burst, cannon, fireworks, rain)
interaction.touch: Tap the canvas to fire a burst at that point

drops.title: Expanding Panels
drops.description: A flex row of panels where hovering one grows it while the rest yield — one transition on the flex property.
drops.concept: Every panel starts at an equal flex-basis; hovering sets the active panel to a large flex-grow while its siblings dim and shrink, animated purely by transitioning the flex value. Collapsed panels show a vertical spine label that fades into a full caption as the panel expands, and touch devices tap-to-pin instead of hovering.
drops.source: CSS Script — Accordion-Style Image Galleries with CSS Flexbox

interaction.mouse: Hover any panel to expand it and shrink the others
interaction.click: Adjust expand ratio, duration and gap in the debug panel
interaction.touch: Tap a panel to pin it open

drops.title: Marker Highlight Type
drops.description: Gradient markers painted behind text via animated background-size — sweeping in on hover and on scroll.
drops.concept: A no-repeat linear-gradient is placed as the text's background and animated from 0% to 100% width, so the color sweeps across the words like a felt-tip marker; box-decoration-break: clone keeps it clean across line wraps. A second variant swaps the hover trigger for animation-timeline: view() so the highlight is scrubbed by scroll position with zero JavaScript, plus underline-draw and strike-through variants.
drops.source: dev.to/shubhamjain — "How to Create Marker Highlight Effect in CSS"

interaction.mouse: Hover a sentence to paint its markers, links and strike-throughs
interaction.click: Tune marker color, thickness, skew and speed in the debug panel
interaction.touch: Scroll the scroll-reveal sections to scrub their highlights

drops.title: Scrubbable Number Fields
drops.description: Drag any value left or right to scrub it — the Figma / Blender / After Effects trick, with fine control and typing.
drops.concept: Pressing a value field starts a pointer drag whose horizontal delta maps to a value change scaled by the field's range and a sensitivity knob; holding Shift drops to fine (0.2x) steps. When available it engages Pointer Lock so the cursor never hits a screen edge, integrating movementX instead of absolute position, and double-click switches to a plain typeable input. A live gradient card mirrors opacity, rotation, scale, blur and hue.

interaction.mouse: Press and drag horizontally on any amber value; Shift for fine control; double-click to type
interaction.click: Toggle Pointer Lock and set sensitivity in the debug panel
interaction.touch: Drag a value left/right with a finger (falls back to absolute delta)

drops.title: OTP Code Input
drops.description: One transparent field behind styled cells: native paste, autofill and keyboard, with shake and success states.
drops.concept: A single transparent input with autocomplete="one-time-code" sits over a row of rendered cell divs, so the browser sees one real field — SMS autofill, paste-to-fill, and screen readers all just work — while each keystroke mirrors into the boxes with an animated caret on the active slot. Completing the code validates it, glowing green on success or shaking red and clearing on a mismatch, with 4-digit, 6-digit and masked variants.

interaction.mouse: Click any code group and type; paste a full code to fill every box
interaction.click: Use the Clear button to reset a group
interaction.touch: Tap a group to focus and use the numeric keypad or paste
